article_id: 85. Submission of Bills to People by Referendum
text_snippet: 1. The President shall submit to the People by Referendum every Bill or any provision in any Bill which the Cabinet of Ministers has certified as being intended to be submitted to the People by Refere

article_id: 86. Submission of matters of national importance to People by Referendum
text_snippet: The President may, subject to the provisions of Article 85, submit to the People by Referendum any matter which in the opinion of the President is of national importance.

article_id: 90. Qualification for election as a Member of Parliament
text_snippet: Every person who is qualified to be an elector shall be qualified to be elected as a Member of Parliament unless he is disqualified under the provisions of Article 91.

article_id: 91. Disqualification for election as a Member of Parliament

article_id: 93. Election to be free, equal and secret
text_snippet: The voting for the election of the President of the Republic and of the Members of Parliament and at any Referendum shall be free, equal and by secret ballot.
